Our Initiatives

Our Programs

Comprehensive programs designed to address the diverse needs of refugees and host communities, creating lasting pathways out of poverty.

5,000+

Direct Beneficiaries

16

Active Programs

25+

Communities Reached

85%

Women & Children

What We Do

Creating Lasting Change

Our programs are designed with input from the communities we serve, ensuring they address real needs and create sustainable impact. From education to economic empowerment, from health to advocacy — we work across multiple sectors to create comprehensive solutions.

Education Programs

Empowering refugees through adult literacy, vocational training, and capacity building.

1,500+ helpedLearn More

Economic Empowerment

Building sustainable incomes and financial independence.

500+ helpedLearn More

Urban Refugee Livelihoods

Empowering refugees to build independent urban lives.

300+ helpedLearn More

Skills Development

Practical vocational training for self-reliance.

helpedLearn More

Financial Inclusion

Savings, credit and financial literacy.

helpedLearn More

Rights & Advocacy

Protecting human rights and dignity.

helpedLearn More

Sporting and Artistic

Promoting sports, creativity, and youth talent development for community well-being.

helpedLearn More

Mental Health and Disability Support

Providing psychosocial support and promoting inclusion for vulnerable groups.

helpedLearn More

Culinary Art

Training in cooking skills, food safety, and culinary entrepreneurship.

helpedLearn More

Agriculture Programs

Supporting sustainable farming, food security, and rural livelihoods.

helpedLearn More

Fishing Program

Promoting sustainable fishing practices and aquaculture for food security and income generation.

800+ helpedLearn More
How We Work

Our Approach

01

Assess

We conduct thorough needs assessments with community input to understand local challenges.

02

Design

Programs are co-designed with beneficiaries to ensure relevance and ownership.

03

Implement

Our trained staff deliver quality programs with ongoing monitoring and support.

04

Evaluate

We measure impact, gather feedback, and continuously improve our approaches.

Support Our Programs

Your contribution helps us reach more communities and expand our programs. Together, we can create lasting change in the lives of those who need it most.

Donate NowGet Involved

MDHF

Mwinja Divine Help Foundation

Empowering refugees and host communities through sustainable livelihood programs and inclusive development initiatives.

“To protect and love, care and support vulnerable people”
